# singlestoredb_projects (Data Source)

This data source provides a list of projects available to the authenticated user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "singlestoredb" {
  // The SingleStoreDB Terraform provider uses the SINGLESTOREDB_API_KEY environment variable for authentication.
  // Please set this environment variable with your SingleStore Management API key.
  // You can generate this key from the SingleStore Portal at https://portal.singlestore.com/organizations/org-id/api-keys.
}

data "singlestoredb_projects" "all" {}

output "all_projects" {
  description = "All accessible projects for the user."
  value       = data.singlestoredb_projects.all
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `projects` (Attributes List) List of projects available to the user. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects))

<a id="nestedatt--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the project was created.
- `edition` (String) The edition of the project.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the project.
- `name` (String) The name of the project.
